# melonloader (vendored)

This directory contains a bundled copy of the upstream mod loader used as a fallback when
install.cmd cannot reach upstream. Refreshed automatically by scripts/package-release.ps1
via Refresh-VendoredLoader in cameraunlock-core/powershell/ModLoaderSetup.psm1.
